title: Managing Secrets using Kustomize — Edit a Secret
text:
In your
kustomization.yaml
file, modify the data, such as the
password
.
Apply the directory that contains the kustomization file:
kubectl apply -k <directory-path>
The output is similar to:
secret/db-user-pass-6f24b56cc8 created
In your
kustomization.yaml
file, modify the data, such as the
password
.
Apply the directory that contains the kustomization file:
kubectl apply -k <directory-path>
The output is similar to:
secret/db-user-pass-6f24b56cc8 created
The edited Secret is created as a new
Secret
object, instead of updating the
existing
Secret
object. You might need to update references to the Secret in
your Pods.
